steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Predict Region Location Routing · Theory Region Location Routing
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory TypeScript file-delivery team handles case 4082 during a AWS SDK v3 dependency canary. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to narrow bucket type before validating directory-bucket endpoint and session state; retain keyboard and screen-reader progress, cancellation, error, and recovery evidence; then replace one typed fixture with unknown runtime input and prove rejection before AWS use. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. Node and AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, PostgreSQL, credentials, host state, handle and stream checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
